title: eryngium neei
intro: Eryngium neei, also known as Nees' Sea Holly, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Eryngium neei include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
